development, deployment, and monitoring of Generative AI and Agentic AI systems. 
Section 1 – Risk Classification 
AI-SDL-001 
All AI systems shall be classified as Low, Medium, High, or Critical risk prior to production 
deployment. 
AI-SDL-002', 'Section 3 – Change Management 
AI-SDL-006 
Any material change to model architecture, foundation model provider, retrieval corpus, or 
decision logic shall require re-validation prior to production deployment. 
AI-SDL-007 
Minor prompt modifications that do not materially affect system behavior may be approved 
through expedited review.']
